amendments.reason: Full audit (closure + doc_drift + signature_drift) flagged 6 ADRs whose frontmatter governs scistudio.api.runtime.* symbols + src/scistudio/api/runtime.py. The runtime sub-package refactor makes those claims unresolvable — they must be updated to point at the new sub-module paths or at the package as a directory glob. Per dispatch's 'Update docs or record N/A reason', the ADR frontmatter updates are part of this refactor.
